hero.headline: RELIABLE REAL ESTATE, CONSTRUCTION, AND VEHICLE RENTAL SOLUTIONS IN KIGALI, RWANDA
hero.subheadline: Construction Supply and Commission Agent Ltd delivers trusted services in real estate, construction, car rental, and leasing—helping individuals and businesses move forward with confidence.

about.title: About Us
about.content: Construction Supply and Commission Agent Ltd is a Kigali-based company providing professional services in real estate, construction, and vehicle rental solutions. We work with individuals, businesses, and organizations to deliver reliable, practical, and well-coordinated services tailored to local market needs.
about.content2: Our approach is built on trust, efficiency, and strong execution. Whether supporting property transactions, construction projects, or vehicle rental services, we focus on delivering value and long-term relationships.

items: Real estate agency and commission services

ui.legalComplianceDesc: Seamless transfer and title deed services.
ui.qualityAuditDesc: Rigorous structural vetting of all listings.
ui.realEstateDetailDesc: Strategic property acquisition and management tailored for the Rwandan commercial landscape. Our team understands the nuances of the Kigali master plan, ensuring your investments are positioned for long-term growth.
ui.constructionDetailDesc: Complexity in construction starts with the supply chain. We eliminate bottlenecks by acting as your dedicated procurement office, managing everything from bulk cement to specialized electrical components.
ui.video1Desc: Discover how CSCA Ltd helps clients find and acquire the right properties across Rwanda.
